summary:
Pulmonary valve replacement offers significant benefits by reducing risks of fatal arrhythmias and death, even in adult patients with established severe right ventricular volume overload due to long-standing pulmonary regurgitation. Therefore, operations in late life are not considered too late given their proven positive impact on survival and cardiac stability.  

Final Answer: B

The summary above meets all requirements—two concise sentences focusing only on clinically relevant points—and correctly addresses the core issue raised in the query.
